title: Overzenith
description: Better enchantment description for zenith and other enchantment related mods (or vanilla)
body:
# Overzenith

Overzenith is a mod that add formating to enchantment names.

## What does it do exactly?

The name of the enchantment has a color depending on the level. For example, if the enchantment is enchantment to vanilla level, it will be gray, if the level is over the vanilla max, it will be green and if its above Zenith max level, it will be blue. Also, if the level is the maximum level of the range, it will show a sharp indicating that to enchant over that level requires new methods.

Another detail the mod adds, is that the enchantments include an icon indicating the category (it also includes Zenith, Create and Farmer's delight categories)
